metadata.description: Skills for AI-driven development: deep review, task decomposition, LT outline builder, context briefing, ADR capture, and content seed

plugins.name: claude-skills
plugins.description: Deep review (multi-perspective gap analysis), task decomposition (structured issue creation), LT outline builder (interactive presentation outline creation), context briefing (project-aware tech trend impact analysis), ADR capture (architecture decision record via conversational walkthrough), and content seed (extract publishable content from engineering decisions) skills
